title: PARENT EDUCATION AND SUPPORT - 211info
text: LIFEWORKS NW ST JOHNS PARENT EDUCATION AND SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Strengthening Families is a nationally recognized prevention model designed to improve family relationships through a home-based parent, youth, and family skill-building curriculum. 8425 N Lombard Street Portland, OR 97203 Eligibility: Ages 10-14 and their families Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-1pm Email (503) 645-9010 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (503) 645-9010 Intake (888) 645-1666 Toll-free Main phone (503) 283-4776 For follow-up calls Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for intake FEES: Varies by program. Nearly all LifeWorks Northwest programs accept OHP/Medicaid and Medicare. Some programs serve uninsured individuals or offer free or discounted services. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus lines 4, 17, and 75 Services: Home Based Parenting Education Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ACTIVE PARENTING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CHILDREN'S RELIEF NURSERY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - DAY TREATMENT FOR CHILDREN AND YOUTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OUTPATIENT MENTAL HEALTH CARE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PARENT-CHILD INTERACTIVE THERAPY MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TRANSITION-AGE YOUTH SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LIFEWORKS NW ST JOHNS
